title: 3 Easy Holiday DIY's!
excerpt: All about keeping things simple for the holidays. I can hardly believe Thanksgiving is next week. Where does the time go?! I'm always looking for easy projects that are cute yet don't take too much time to make. Shared a…
body: All about keeping things simple for the holidays. I can hardly believe Thanksgiving is next week. Where does the time go?! I'm always looking for easy projects that are cute yet don't take too much time to make. Shared a video on my YouTube channel with easy crafty holiday DIY's. Hope you enjoy! What holiday craft projects are you up to?
